TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Hage_Geingob, title = Hage_Geingob, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hage_Geingob} }

S.FORM: = Hage Geingob = Mntucing hngkawas 1941 idas 8 jiyax 3 ka Hage Geingob ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Namibia ta sayang o kiya ka Hage Geingob, pnaah hngkawas 2015 idas 3 jiyax 21 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Pnyahan pnatas
S.PHON: = ħagə gəiŋob = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * ka ħagə gəiŋob ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan namibia ta sajaŋ o kija ka ħagə gəiŋob, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. pnjaħan pnatas
S.FORM: = Hage Geingob = Mntucing hngkawas 1941 idas 8 jiyax 3 ka Hage Geingob ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Namibia ta sayang o kiya ka Hage Geingob, pnaah hngkawas 2015 idas 3 jiyax 21 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Pnyahan pnatas
S.PHON: = ħagə gəiŋob = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * ka ħagə gəiŋob ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan namibia ta sajaŋ o kija ka ħagə gəiŋob, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. pnjaħan pnatas
